name_en: Delft City Hall and Market Square

phrases.cultural_note: Market vendors in Dutch open-air markets are known to prioritize cash; card acceptance is rare.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Nieuwe Kerk entrance
phrases.text_local: Waar is de ingang van de Nieuwe Kerk?
phrases.cultural_note: Dutch church staff typically handle entrance guidance; direct answers about exact location are avoided.

likely_response.local: De ingang is aan de Marktzijde.
likely_response.translation_en: The entrance is on the Market Square side.

responses.english: The entrance is on the Market Square side.
responses.local: De ingang is aan de Marktzijde.

phrases.intent_en: How do I pay for parking
phrases.text_local: Hoe betaal ik voor het parkeren?
phrases.cultural_note: Payment at the square's edge aligns with municipal parking zones; exact mechanisms are handled by staff.

likely_response.local: Betaal bij de parkeerautomaat aan de rand van de Markt, vlak bij de gracht.
likely_response.translation_en: Pay at the parking meter at the edge of the Market Square, near the canal.

responses.english: Pay at the parking meter at the edge of the Market Square, near the canal.
responses.local: Betaal bij de parkeerautomaat aan de rand van de Markt, vlak bij de gracht.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy Delft blue pottery
phrases.text_local: Waar koop ik Delfts blauw aardewerk?
phrases.cultural_note: Delft blue pottery is a hallmark of the city; vendors rotate stalls, so direct location cues are avoided.
